AdjudicationMetadata.description:
Physician adjudication metadata for vignette inclusion in corpus.

Citations:
    - Cohen 1960 (original kappa coefficient)
    - Landis & Koch 1977 (substantial agreement >=0.61 threshold)
    - McHugh 2012 PMC3900052 (>=0.7 preferred for clinical/high-stakes)
    - Cochrane handbook for systematic reviews (disagreement resolution)

adjudicator_ids.description: Adjudicator unique identifiers. Minimum 2 required for inter-rater reliability calculation per Cohen 1960; McHugh 2012 PMC3900052.
adjudicator_ids.title: Adjudicator Ids

cohen_kappa.description: Cohen's kappa coefficient. Inclusion threshold >=0.61 (Landis & Koch 1977 'substantial'); >=0.7 preferred for clinical (McHugh 2012).
cohen_kappa.title: Cohen Kappa

disagreement_resolution.description: Pre-registered disagreement resolution protocol per Cochrane handbook for systematic reviews adapted to vignette QA.
disagreement_resolution.title: Disagreement Resolution

anchoring_documentation.description: Free text linking vignette to source paper(s) used as clinical anchor.
anchoring_documentation.title: Anchoring Documentation

AdjudicationMetadata.title: AdjudicationMetadata

CSFProfile.description:
CSF analysis results — the primary diagnostic discriminator across 9 classes.

Citations:
    - IDSA Tunkel 2004 (bacterial cutoffs from van de Beek 422-pt analysis)
    - Huynh Lancet Neurol 2022 (TB CSF patterns)
    - NIH OI cryptococcosis (OP>=25 in 60-80%)
    - Ye TM&IH 2023 doi:10.1111/tmi.13849 (ADA cutoff 10 U/L)
    - Prasad Cureus 2023 doi:10.7759/cureus.39896 (ADA confirmation)
    - Williams CID 2015 (CrAg LFA near-100% sensitivity)
    - StatPearls NBK535447 (PAM wet mount diagnosis)
    - Perry BMJ 2015 PMID 25739953 (xanthochromia + RBC for SAH)
    - Sakushima J Infect 2011 (lactate>3.5 favors bacterial)
    - Del Brutto 2017 (eosinophilic CSF in racemose NCC)

opening_pressure_cmH2O.description: Opening pressure cmH2O. >=25 cmH2O in 60-80% of HIV-cryptococcal (NIH OI guidelines, AMBITION-cm); >=30 = therapeutic LP trigger.
opening_pressure_cmH2O.title: Opening Pressure Cmh2O

csf_wbc_per_mm3.description: CSF white blood cell count per mm3. PAM 1k-30k neutrophilic; bacterial 1k-5k neutrophilic; viral 50-1k lymphocytic; TB 100-500 lymphocytic. IDSA Tunkel 2004.
csf_wbc_per_mm3.title: Csf Wbc Per Mm3

csf_neutrophil_pct.description: CSF neutrophil percentage. Bacterial 80-95% neutrophilic; PAM neutrophilic; viral/TB/fungal lymphocytic.
csf_neutrophil_pct.title: Csf Neutrophil Pct

csf_lymphocyte_pct.description: CSF lymphocyte percentage. Required complement to neutrophil%; sum-to-100 validator with eosinophil%.
csf_lymphocyte_pct.title: Csf Lymphocyte Pct

csf_eosinophil_pct.description: CSF eosinophil percentage. >10% suggests parasitic - racemose NCC, Angiostrongylus, schistosomiasis (Del Brutto 2017).
csf_eosinophil_pct.title: Csf Eosinophil Pct

csf_glucose_mg_per_dL.description: CSF glucose mg/dL. <34 mg/dL or CSF:serum <0.23 = >=99% specific for bacterial vs viral (IDSA Tunkel 2004).
csf_glucose_mg_per_dL.title: Csf Glucose Mg Per Dl

csf_protein_mg_per_dL.description: CSF protein mg/dL. Bacterial often >220 (>=99% specific cutoff); TB typically 100-500; viral <=150.
csf_protein_mg_per_dL.title: Csf Protein Mg Per Dl

csf_lactate_mmol_per_L.description: CSF lactate mmol/L. >3.5 favors bacterial; <3.5 viral. Confounded by post-antibiotic exposure (Sakushima 2011).
csf_lactate_mmol_per_L.title: Csf Lactate Mmol Per L

csf_ada_U_per_L.description: CSF adenosine deaminase U/L. >=10 U/L = optimal cutoff for TB meningitis (Ye TM&IH 2023; Prasad Cureus 2023; AUC 0.94).
csf_ada_U_per_L.title: Csf Ada U Per L

csf_crag_lfa_result.description: CSF cryptococcal antigen lateral flow assay. Near-100% sensitivity in HIV-cryptococcal (Williams CID 2015).
csf_crag_lfa_result.title: Csf Crag Lfa Result

csf_wet_mount_motile_amoebae.description: CSF wet mount for motile trophozoites. N. fowleri commonly visible (unlike Balamuthia/Acanthamoeba). CDC: Gram stain destroys organism.
csf_wet_mount_motile_amoebae.title: Csf Wet Mount Motile Amoebae

csf_xanthochromia_present.description: CSF xanthochromia. Present ~100% at 12h post-bleed (SAH). Perry BMJ 2015 PMID 25739953.
csf_xanthochromia_present.title: Csf Xanthochromia Present

csf_rbc_per_mm3.description: CSF red blood cell count per mm3. >2000 non-decreasing across tubes plus xanthochromia = SAH.
csf_rbc_per_mm3.title: Csf Rbc Per Mm3

csf_rbc_decreasing_across_tubes.description: RBC count decreasing tube 1 to 4 = traumatic tap; non-decreasing with xanthochromia = SAH.
csf_rbc_decreasing_across_tubes.title: Csf Rbc Decreasing Across Tubes

CSFProfile.title: CSFProfile

ClassLabel.description:
9-class differential diagnosis ground-truth labels.

Class assignments are mutually exclusive at the per-vignette level.
See SCHEMA_README.md for full diagnostic criteria mapping.
ClassLabel.title: ClassLabel

Demographics.description:
Demographic context for vignette.

Citations:
    - PAM bimodal age: Gharpure et al. CID 2021 (PMID 32369575)
    - NMDAR sex distribution: Graus Lancet Neurol 2016 (doi:10.1016/S1474-4422(15)00401-9)
    - HACE altitude threshold: Wilderness Medical Society 2024 (PMID 37833187)
    - Peru regional epidemiology: MMWR 2024-2025; Allen Pathogens 2023

age_years.description: Age in years. PAM bimodal (median ~14 y, Gharpure CID 2021); HSV-1 bimodal <20 / >50; NCC 20-40 in endemic regions.
age_years.title: Age Years

sex.description: Biological sex. PAM ~75% male (recreational water exposure pattern, Gharpure 2021); NMDAR ~80% female (Graus 2016).
sex.title: Sex

ethnicity.description: Self-identified ethnicity. Hispanic/mestizo overrepresentation in Balamuthia documented in Latin American series (Bravo PMC8760460).
ethnicity.title: Ethnicity

geography_region.description: Geographic region. Maps to disease epidemiology: Loreto/Madre de Dios to arboviral/malaria; Cusco/Puno >3000m to HACE; Tumbes to NCC endemic; coastal Peru to Balamuthia; US South to PAM; Karachi to ablution-PAM.
geography_region.title: Geography Region

altitude_residence_m.description: Altitude of residence in meters. HACE risk threshold >2,500 m (WMS 2024 PMID 37833187). Cusco 3,399 m; Puno 3,827 m.
altitude_residence_m.title: Altitude Residence M

Demographics.title: Demographics

DiagnosticTests.description:
Diagnostic test results array.

Includes Gram stain, blood/CSF cultures, HSV-1/enterovirus PCR, FilmArray ME panel
(sensitivity 90% / specificity 97% pooled meta-analysis, PMID 31760115),
Xpert MTB/RIF (85%/98% Hernandez TM&IH 2021), Xpert Ultra (Cresswell CID 2020),
EITB cysticercosis (~98% >=2 viable cysts, Tsang 1989), Balamuthia IFA, brain
biopsy histology, malaria thick/thin smear, dengue NS1, mNGS for free-living amebae.
DiagnosticTests.title: DiagnosticTests

DxResult.description: Single diagnostic test result with sensitivity/specificity attribution.
DxResult.title: DxResult

ExposureHistory.description:
Exposure history including PAM always-flag fields.

Citations:
    - CDC PAM 2017 case definition (ndc.services.cdc.gov)
    - MMWR 2025 splash pad (PMID 40146665)
    - Karachi ablution-PAM: PMC10620794
    - WMS 2024 HACE (PMID 37833187)
    - Del Brutto 2017 NCC criteria (PMID 28017213)
    - Ford CID 2018 cryptococcal CD4 threshold (PMC5850628)

freshwater_exposure_within_14d.description: CRITICAL FIELD for PAM always-flag rule (CDC 2017 case definition). True if patient had recreational freshwater exposure or nasal irrigation/ablution within 14 days before symptom onset.
freshwater_exposure_within_14d.title: Freshwater Exposure Within 14D

freshwater_exposure_type.description: Type of freshwater exposure. Splash pad documented in MMWR 2025 (Arkansas case PMID 40146665). Ablution dominant in Karachi.
freshwater_exposure_type.title: Freshwater Exposure Type

altitude_exposure_within_7d_m.description: Maximum altitude reached in past 7 days, in meters. HACE risk begins ~2,500 m; serious risk >3,500 m (WMS 2024 PMID 37833187).
altitude_exposure_within_7d_m.title: Altitude Exposure Within 7D M

pork_consumption_or_taenia_contact.description: Pork consumption or household Taenia contact. Minor epidemiologic criterion in Del Brutto 2017 NCC. Tumbes Peru cohort 38% NCC.
pork_consumption_or_taenia_contact.title: Pork Consumption Or Taenia Contact

mosquito_endemic_area_exposure.description: Mosquito-endemic area exposure (Aedes for dengue, Anopheles for P. falciparum). Loreto/Madre de Dios documented hot zones.
mosquito_endemic_area_exposure.title: Mosquito Endemic Area Exposure

immunocompromise_status.description: Immunocompromise status. CD4<100 to cryptococcal screening threshold (Ford CID 2018 PMC5850628). HSCT to highest Acanthamoeba GAE risk.
immunocompromise_status.title: Immunocompromise Status

hiv_status.description: HIV status. Independent of CD4 absolute count for class-conditional validation (NIH OI guidelines).
hiv_status.title: Hiv Status

cd4_count_cells_per_uL.description: CD4 count cells/uL. Required when HIV+ for cryptococcal disease diagnosis (Ford CID 2018; <100 = high CrAg risk).
cd4_count_cells_per_uL.title: Cd4 Count Cells Per Ul

ExposureHistory.title: ExposureHistory

History.description:
History of present illness.

Citations:
    - PAM time course: MMWR 2025 (PMID 40146665) - 1-12 days, median 5
    - TB time course: Huynh Lancet Neurol 2022
    - Cryptococcal subacute: NIH OI cryptococcosis

symptom_onset_to_presentation_days.description: Days from symptom onset to presentation. PAM 1-12 d; bacterial 1-3 d; viral days-week; TB 14-56 d; cryptococcal 7-84 d (subacute).
symptom_onset_to_presentation_days.title: Symptom Onset To Presentation Days

chief_complaint.description: Primary chief complaint. Thunderclap to SAH/RCVS; gait ataxia + altitude to HACE; behavioral change + dyskinesia to NMDAR (Graus 2016).
chief_complaint.title: Chief Complaint

prodrome_description.description: Free-text prodrome description (e.g., genital lesions before HSV-2 meningitis, AMS prodrome before HACE, viral URI before enteroviral).
prodrome_description.title: Prodrome Description

red_flags_present.description: Clinical red flags requiring specific diagnostic consideration per IDSA/CDC guidance.
red_flags_present.title: Red Flags Present

History.title: History

Imaging.description:
Neuroimaging findings.

Citations:
    - IDSA Tunkel 2008 (MRI preferred for encephalitis)
    - Del Brutto 2017 NCC (scolex within cyst absolute criterion)
    - StatPearls NBK557643 (HSV-1 mesial temporal FLAIR >90% MRI)
    - Lancet Neurol Huynh 2022 (TB basal meningeal enhancement)
    - Hinchey NEJM 1996 (PRES parieto-occipital)
    - Hackett HAH 1998 (HACE microhemorrhages)

imaging_modality.description: Imaging modality. MRI with FLAIR/DWI preferred per IDSA 2008 encephalitis; CT first-line for SAH (~99% sensitivity <6h).
imaging_modality.title: Imaging Modality

imaging_pattern.description: Class-discriminative imaging pattern. HSV-1: mesial-temporal FLAIR. TB: basal meningeal enhancement + hydrocephalus. Cryptococcal: dilated VR spaces. Balamuthia/GAE: multiple ring-enhancing. NCC: cysts +/- scolex (Del Brutto 2017). PAM: cerebral edema. HACE: vasogenic edema + microhemorrhages. SAH: hyperdense basal cisterns. PRES: parieto-occipital edema. RCVS: segmental vasoconstriction.
imaging_pattern.title: Imaging Pattern

imaging_finding_count.description: Number/staging of lesions. Supports NCC staging (vesicular/colloidal/granular nodular/calcified per Del Brutto) and GAE multifocality.
imaging_finding_count.title: Imaging Finding Count

imaging_text_summary.description: Free-text radiologist impression for adjudicator context.
imaging_text_summary.title: Imaging Text Summary

Imaging.title: Imaging

Labs.description:
Peripheral lab values.

Citations:
    - IDSA Tunkel 2004 (bacterial WBC patterns)
    - WHO Dengue Guidelines 2023 (platelet thresholds)
    - Sormunen Pediatrics 1999 (CRP>40 favors bacterial)
    - Vikse 2015 meta-analysis (procalcitonin)
    - AAFP Hyponatremia 2015 (Na<125 severe)
    - Marais Lancet ID 2010 (TB SIADH)

wbc_blood_per_uL.description: Peripheral WBC count cells/uL. Leukocytosis supports bacterial sepsis; lymphopenia in severe dengue/malaria.
wbc_blood_per_uL.title: Wbc Blood Per Ul

platelets_per_uL.description: Platelet count cells/uL. <100k strongly supports dengue/severe malaria; DIC in meningococcal.
platelets_per_uL.title: Platelets Per Ul

alt_ast_U_per_L.description: ALT/AST U/L. Elevation in dengue (>1000 = severe dengue criterion), Plasmodium hepatic involvement.
alt_ast_U_per_L.title: Alt Ast U Per L

crp_mg_per_L.description: C-reactive protein mg/L. >40 mg/L favors bacterial over viral (Sormunen Pediatrics 1999).
crp_mg_per_L.title: Crp Mg Per L

procalcitonin_ng_per_mL.description: Procalcitonin ng/mL. >0.5 ng/mL favors bacterial (Vikse 2015 meta).
procalcitonin_ng_per_mL.title: Procalcitonin Ng Per Ml

serum_sodium_mEq_per_L.description: Serum sodium mEq/L. <125 = severe symptomatic hyponatremia (non-infectious mimic class); SIADH common in TB meningitis.
serum_sodium_mEq_per_L.title: Serum Sodium Meq Per L

Labs.title: Labs

LiteratureAnchor.description:
Peer-reviewed literature anchor for vignette clinical fidelity.

Citations:
    - PMID format spec (NLM PubMed)
    - DOI format spec (ISO 26324:2022)

anchor_type.description: Type of literature anchor. Used by adjudicators to weight clinical fidelity (case_report < cohort < meta_analysis < rct).
anchor_type.title: Anchor Type

pmid.description: PubMed ID (7-9 digits). At least one of pmid or doi required.
pmid.title: Pmid

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier. At least one of pmid or doi required.
doi.title: Doi

LiteratureAnchor.title: LiteratureAnchor

PhysicalExam.description:
Physical examination findings.

Citations:
    - IDSA bacterial meningitis 2004 (van de Beek triad)
    - IDSA encephalitis 2008
    - Bravo PMC8760460 (centrofacial Balamuthia 73%)
    - StatPearls Meningococcal NBK549849 (petechiae 62-81%)
    - Lancet Neurol Huynh 2022 (CN VI in TB ~30%)

mental_status_grade.description: Categorical mental status. Required for IDSA encephalitis case definition (Tunkel 2008): altered MS, behavioral change, seizure, focal.
mental_status_grade.title: Mental Status Grade

neck_stiffness.description: Neck stiffness (meningismus). Triad sensitivity 44% in bacterial meningitis (van de Beek NEJM 2004).
neck_stiffness.title: Neck Stiffness

kernig_or_brudzinski_positive.description: Kernig and/or Brudzinski sign. Low sensitivity (~5% individually) but high specificity for meningeal irritation (Thomas CID 2002).
kernig_or_brudzinski_positive.title: Kernig Or Brudzinski Positive

focal_neurological_deficit.description: Focal neurological deficit. Raises probability of HSV-1, TB (CN palsy 30%), NCC, GAE, SAH; rare in pure aseptic meningitis.
focal_neurological_deficit.title: Focal Neurological Deficit

cranial_nerve_palsy.description: Cranial nerve palsy. CN VI palsy in ~30% of TB meningitis (basilar exudate, Lancet Neurol Huynh 2022).
cranial_nerve_palsy.title: Cranial Nerve Palsy

skin_lesion_centrofacial_chronic.description: Centrofacial skin lesion preceding CNS by months. 73% of Peruvian Balamuthia cases (Bravo PMC8760460); median 15 months pre-CNS.
skin_lesion_centrofacial_chronic.title: Skin Lesion Centrofacial Chronic

petechial_or_purpuric_rash.description: Petechial or purpuric rash. 62-81% in meningococcal meningitis (van de Beek 2008); rapidly evolving suggests purpura fulminans.
petechial_or_purpuric_rash.title: Petechial Or Purpuric Rash

papilledema_on_fundoscopy.description: Papilledema. Suggests elevated ICP: cryptococcal (60-80% with OP>=25), TB hydrocephalus, PRES, SAH, severe NCC.
papilledema_on_fundoscopy.title: Papilledema On Fundoscopy

PhysicalExam.title: PhysicalExam

Provenance.description:
Vignette generation provenance for audit trail and reproducibility.

Citations:
    - Mitchell et al. 2019 (Model Cards framework, doi:10.1145/3287560.3287596)
    - FAIR data principles 2016
    - SHA-256 spec (NIST FIPS 180-4)

generation_timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of vignette generation. Required for reproducibility audit per FAIR principles.
generation_timestamp_utc.title: Generation Timestamp Utc

generator_model_identifier.description: Model identifier string used for generation (e.g., 'claude-sonnet-4.5/2026-04-15' or 'manual-fixture-2026-05-02').
generator_model_identifier.title: Generator Model Identifier

prompt_hash_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of generation prompt. NIST FIPS 180-4 spec; 64 lowercase hex characters.
prompt_hash_sha256.title: Prompt Hash Sha256

schema_version.description: Schema version for migration management. Locked to '2.0'.
schema_version.title: Schema Version

inclusion_decision_rationale.description: Free-text rationale for inclusion decision; readable by adjudicators.
inclusion_decision_rationale.title: Inclusion Decision Rationale

Provenance.title: Provenance

VitalSigns.description:
Vital signs at presentation.

Citations:
    - GCS: Teasdale & Jennett Lancet 1974
    - Sepsis-3 criteria: Singer JAMA 2016
    - WHO cerebral malaria GCS<11: WHO 2023 Malaria Guidelines
    - PRES BP: Hinchey NEJM 1996

temperature_celsius.description: Body temperature in Celsius. Fever >38C supports infection. Afebrile coma possible in cerebral malaria.
temperature_celsius.title: Temperature Celsius

heart_rate_bpm.description: Heart rate in beats per minute. Tachycardia plus hypotension supports septic shock (Sepsis-3, Singer JAMA 2016).
heart_rate_bpm.title: Heart Rate Bpm

systolic_bp_mmHg.description: Systolic blood pressure mmHg. Severe HTN >180 supports PRES (Hinchey NEJM 1996); SBP<90 with shock supports meningococcal Waterhouse-Friderichsen.
systolic_bp_mmHg.title: Systolic Bp Mmhg

glasgow_coma_scale.description: Glasgow Coma Scale 3-15. Severe <=8; cerebral malaria <11 per WHO. Teasdale & Jennett Lancet 1974.
glasgow_coma_scale.title: Glasgow Coma Scale

oxygen_saturation_pct.description: SpO2 percent. HAPE coexistent with HACE if SpO2<85% at altitude.
oxygen_saturation_pct.title: Oxygen Saturation Pct

respiratory_rate_breaths_per_min.description: Respiratory rate breaths/min. RR>30 plus altered MS in WHO severe malaria criteria.
respiratory_rate_breaths_per_min.title: Respiratory Rate Breaths Per Min

VitalSigns.title: VitalSigns

description:
Top-level vignette container for 9-class meningitis/encephalitis differential.

All sub-models are required except where Optional is annotated. Cross-field
validators enforce class-conditional clinical rules:

1. PAM always-flag rule (CDC PAM 2017 case definition):
   If ground_truth_class == ClassLabel.PAM, then
   exposure.freshwater_exposure_within_14d MUST be True.

2. Cryptococcal CD4 consistency (Ford CID 2018 PMC5850628):
   If ground_truth_class == ClassLabel.CRYPTOCOCCAL_FUNGAL and HIV+,
   then cd4_count_cells_per_uL MUST be set.

3. Schema version lock: schema_version is Literal['2.0'] at top level
   (mirrors provenance.schema_version for redundant safety).

schema_version.description: Schema version locked to '2.0'. Top-level lock mirrors provenance.schema_version for migration safety.
schema_version.title: Schema Version

case_id.description: Unique case identifier within corpus. Convention: '<CLASS>-<NNN>-<ANCHOR-PMID>' (e.g., 'PAM-001-MMWR-2025-Arkansas').
case_id.title: Case Id

ground_truth_class.description: Ground-truth diagnostic class (1-9) per ClassLabel IntEnum.

literature_anchors.description: At least one peer-reviewed literature anchor required.
literature_anchors.title: Literature Anchors

narrative_es.description: Spanish-language clinical narrative for bilingual deployment (UPCH/Peru target).
narrative_es.title: Narrative Es

narrative_en.description: English-language clinical narrative for bilingual deployment.
narrative_en.title: Narrative En

title: VignetteSchema
